steps.title: Triage
steps.promptTemplate: Safety signal detected for stream {{streamId}} from rule {{ruleId}} at confidence {{confidence}}. Perform immediate triage and verify severity.

steps.title: Response Plan
steps.promptTemplate: Generate a concise action plan for stream {{streamId}}. Include who to notify, immediate next action, and follow-up checkpoint.

steps.title: Detect Blocker
steps.promptTemplate: A focus-related trigger fired on stream {{streamId}} (group {{groupId}}, confidence {{confidence}}). Ask one targeted diagnostic question.

steps.title: Micro Plan
steps.promptTemplate: Create a 10-minute micro-plan with one clear deliverable for stream {{streamId}}. Keep it short and executable.

steps.title: Interpret Visual Blocker
steps.promptTemplate: Visual trigger {{visualLabel}} detected on stream {{streamId}} with confidence {{confidence}}. Identify probable blocker class and likely root cause.

steps.title: Suggest Next Action
steps.promptTemplate: For visual blocker {{visualLabel}}, generate the next best action plus one fallback action for stream {{streamId}}.

steps.title: Endpoint Probe
steps.promptTemplate: Health check triggered by keyword '{{keyword}}' on stream {{streamId}} at confidence {{confidence}}. Probe all registered cloud endpoints and report reachable vs unreachable.

steps.title: Health Summary
steps.promptTemplate: Summarize endpoint health for stream {{streamId}}: list failures with {{failedEndpoints}}, latencies with {{endpointLatencies}}, and recommend remediation actions.

steps.title: Remediation Alert
steps.promptTemplate: For any unhealthy endpoints found in stream {{streamId}}, generate an alert payload for {{alertTarget}} with severity level and suggested fix.

steps.title: Doc Audit
steps.promptTemplate: Documentation rule {{ruleId}} fired on stream {{streamId}} at confidence {{confidence}}. Audit the current wiki card set {{wikiCardSet}} for staleness or inconsistencies.

steps.title: Generate Sync Payload
steps.promptTemplate: Based on audit results for {{wikiCardSet}}, generate updated wiki card content for stream {{streamId}} preserving section structure and filling gaps from {{sourceContext}}.

steps.title: Classify Deployment Screen
steps.promptTemplate: Visual object '{{visualLabel}}' detected on stream {{streamId}} with confidence {{confidence}}. Classify the screen: is this a deployment pipeline, log tail, or status dashboard?

steps.title: Extract Deploy Status
steps.promptTemplate: From the classified screen on stream {{streamId}}, extract deployment status: stage {{deployStage}}, service {{serviceName}}, and any error indicators {{errorIndicators}}.

steps.title: Deploy Action Recommendation
steps.promptTemplate: Based on deployment status for {{serviceName}} at stage {{deployStage}}, recommend next action for stream {{streamId}}: proceed, rollback, or retry with rationale.

steps.title: Classify Incident
steps.promptTemplate: Incident keyword combo '{{keyword}}' triggered on stream {{streamId}} at confidence {{confidence}}. Classify incident severity (P1-P4) and identify affected service {{affectedService}}.

steps.title: Triage Actions
steps.promptTemplate: For {{incidentSeverity}} incident on {{affectedService}}, generate triage checklist for stream {{streamId}}: immediate containment, stakeholder notification, and diagnostic commands.

steps.title: Incident Handoff
steps.promptTemplate: Create incident handoff document for stream {{streamId}} summarizing {{incidentSeverity}}, {{affectedService}}, actions taken, and next steps for on-call assignee {{oncallAssignee}}.

steps.title: Correlate Signals
steps.promptTemplate: Compound trigger fired on stream {{streamId}}: keyword '{{keyword}}' and visual '{{visualLabel}}' within {{compoundWindowMs}}ms at confidence {{confidence}}. Correlate audio and visual signals into unified context.

steps.title: Generate Context Card
steps.promptTemplate: From correlated signals on stream {{streamId}}, generate a context card with topic {{contextTopic}}, key entities {{keyEntities}}, and summary for wiki integration {{wikiTarget}}.

steps.title: Diagnose Model Issue
steps.promptTemplate: Model failover keyword '{{keyword}}' detected on stream {{streamId}} at confidence {{confidence}}. Diagnose: is this a timeout, rate-limit, or model error for {{modelProvider}}/{{modelId}}?

steps.title: Execute Model Rotation
steps.promptTemplate: Execute rotation sequence for {{modelId}} on stream {{streamId}}: select fallback model {{fallbackModel}}, validate connectivity, and swap routing weight from {{currentWeight}} to {{fallbackWeight}}.

steps.title: Verify Failover
steps.promptTemplate: Verify failover on stream {{streamId}}: send test prompt to {{fallbackModel}}, confirm response within {{timeoutMs}}ms, and report rotation success or escalation needed.

steps.title: Capture Hook State
steps.promptTemplate: Claude hook {{hookEventName}} fired on {{streamId}} (session {{sessionId}}) via tool {{toolName}} with confidence {{confidence}}. Capture immediate state and potential risk of stall.

steps.title: Recommend Next Action
steps.promptTemplate: Given hook event {{hookEventName}} and utterance {{utterance}}, recommend the smallest next action to keep momentum while avoiding unsafe loops.
